provenance.verdict_reason: Piano Sonata No. 16 in C Major, K. 545, I. Allegro (1788) by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart. Composition: US=public_domain, EU=public_domain. Arrangement by Bernd Krueger. Awaiting Slice 2.5 verification: source URL resolves, license text preserved at source, license version confirmed. Until verified, treat as internal for distribution.
